title: The Top 11 Herbal Teas for Women with Acne and Oily Skin
description: Zingiber officinale teas, also known as ginger tea, have been used for centuries to help manage oily skin. This is due to its high content of antioxidants, including gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help reduce the production of sebum, an oily substance produced by the skin, thereby reducing its oiliness. The tea also contains kaempferol and quercetin, flavonoids that have been shown to inhibit the growth of acne-causing bacteria.  To us...
